description.default: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours
description.custom: Tell us the details of your music project and we'll send you a custom quote

placeholder.default: Tell us more about your project and your goals...
placeholder.custom: Describe your music project: estimated duration, musical style, desired instrumentation, similar references, deadlines if any...

message.default: Attach any document, image or file that helps us better understand your project
message.web: Attach sketches, designs, images or any relevant material for your web project
message.music: Attach music samples, lyrics, references or relevant details for your music project

dropzone.text: Click to upload files or drag them here
dropzone.formats: PDF, DOC, TXT, MP3, JPG, PNG (max 10MB)

dataConsent.label: I consent to the processing of my personal data

statusMessages.thankYou: Thank you for contacting us! We'll respond shortly.
statusMessages.errorMessage: There was an error sending your message. Please try again or contact us directly via WhatsApp.
statusMessages.consentRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to continue.

infoNote.default: We'll respond with a detailed proposal within 24 hours. If you need immediate assistance, text us on WhatsApp at +57 321 974 60 45.
infoNote.custom: For custom projects, we'll evaluate your request and contact you with a proposal tailored to your specific needs.
